case_title: GERARDO SERRANO ET AL VS. CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER et al.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00- SERVED DEC-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER, CHRISTOPHER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $134.00 - SERVED DEC-06-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DUKER, WILLIAM VAN

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SERRANO, GERARDO SERRANO, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER, CHRISTOPHER DUKER, WILLIAM VAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT DUKER, WILLIAM VAN AS TO PLAINTIFF SERRANO, GERARDO SERRANO, ANNIE
REMARK: RETURND MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO WILLIAM VAN DUKER ON 01/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER ON 01/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF ANNIE SERRANO RE; RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERRANO, ANNIE
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY GERALDO SERRANO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANNE SERRANO. APPEARANCE BY TERESA GARCIA. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT WILLIAM VAN DUKER DID NOT APPEAR. HONORABLE JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II FINDS THE VENUE CHALLENGE IS UPHELD AND DISMISSES THIS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS MAY FILE IN PROPER COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-25-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-21-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANDLER, CHRISTOPHER AS TO PLAINTIFF SERRANO, GERARDO SERRANO, ANNIE
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
